titleStmt.title: SII 5.702: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 702. (A.R. No. 138 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
� . svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭain tu poṉmālai tikaḻap pāmālai [malin=ta] parumaṇit tiraḷpuyaṟ tirunila maṭant Aiyoṭu jayamaka ḷiruppa taṉ varaimārva n=ta ṉateṉap peṟṟut tirumaka ḷorutani yiruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarn tu kaṟpiṉaḷāka viruppoṭu nā(va)vakat tiruppa ticaitoṟu n=ti kiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvana muḻutuṅ kavippa(tu) putumati pola veṇkoṭai yaṭimicai niḻaṟṟak karuṅkali yoḷittu vaṉpilattiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭai teluṅka vimanai vilaṅkalmicai yeṟavum kaliṅkapūmiyai kaṉaleri parukavum Aimpaṭai paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkaiymaṇṭalattāṅkini
tirun tu vaṭaticai yaṭippaṭittaruḷi teṉṟicai tarumamu n=tā na[ mu n=ta vamum taḻait] tu vetamum meymaiyu(m) mātiyukampola talaittalai ciṟappa tanittani ciṟan tu- van=ta ruḷi veṟkarum poṟpuli yāṇai pārttivar cūṭi niṟaimaṇi makuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi mannuyiṟ kellām miṉnuyirt tāypol taṉnoḷi parappit tanittani paran tu maṇmuḻutuṅ kavippa manuneṟi vaḷara taṉ ko(y)yil koṟṟavācalpuṟattu maṇinā(v)voṭuṅka muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vijai yamum pukaḻu melme(l) loṅka ceḻiyar veñcuram puka c(o)ralar kaṭal puka vaḻitaru ciṅkaṇa rañca koṅkaṇar cāya neñ calamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭa kaṉnaṭar venniṭa maṟṟetticai maṉnarum
tan=ta mak karaṇenat tirumalarcevaṭi Urimaiyil Iṟaiñca tollai y[ Eḻulaku n=to ḻuteḻa t] Oṉṟiya mullaivāṇakai mukkokkiḻānaṭi yumaiyoṭuñ caṅkara nimaiyat tirun=ta ṉaneṉap porun=ti yuṭaniruppa kaṅkaiyoppākiya terivaiyar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻalmaṭant Ai punitakuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuṭaiyā(ḷ) ḷiva n=ti ruvuḷattaruḷ muḻutumuṭaiyāḷoṭum cempoṉ vīrasiṁ hāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tribhu vanacakra vattikaḷ śrīvikkra macoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu Iṣavanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa ttu Aṣṭa miyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyatti nā
ḷ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu Abhaiyāśriyacatu[ rve timaṅkalat] tu mahāsabhai yom nammur Uṭaiyār maṇiyampalamuṭaiyār koyilile(m) kūṭṭam kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyirun tu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyā(r)ṟku mūlabhṛtya rākiya Āticaṇṭeśvara tevaṟku nāṅkaḷ śāśva tīkamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr teṉpiṭākai vaṭukamāṅkuṭiyil kauvuciyaṉ nārāyaṇa śrīkṛṣṇa ṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyarāṉa nilamum kavuciyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ tiruvāli pakkal vilaikoṇṭa nilamum pāratāya n=ti ricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉ brā (r)hma ṇiyitāy Ivaṉ yāṇṭu nālāvatu
taṉ pokattai Aṟuttuk kuṭiyoṭippoṉa Ivaṉ nila[ m sa] bhai yār pakkal Ivan vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyarāṉa nilamum śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattaiñcāvatu mutal nilainiṉṟu Iṟaiyiṟātey kuṭiyoṭippoy Aṉnilattukku Ūril niṉṟāṟku Iṟukkaveṇṭiṉamaiyil sabhai yār pakkal sabhai vilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta kavuṇiyaṉ pirāmaṇi teva nta ttaṉ nilamum Āka Ivaṟku śāśva tīkamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟ kellai kavuṇiyaṉ cen=ta ṉ jātavetanum veyaṉ kovalaṉ nārāyaṇanum kavuṇiyaṉ mayentra nārāyaṇanum Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkum ten
pāṟ kellai kavuṇiyaṉ mayentra nārāyaṇan Uḷḷiṭṭār nilaṅkaḷukku nīr pāyum Uṭciṟuvāykkālukkum tiricciṟṟampalavāykkā(l)lukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār tevatānamāna nāṭṭuppokkuāna nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai tiruveṅkaṭavāykkā(l)lukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicain=ta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Ivvūr nila mutal pottakattiṉmel kiṭan=ta paṭiye nūṟṟirupatteṭṭuk kuḻi koṇṭa torumāvāka van=ta nilam Oṉṟey mukkāle mākāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiyil naṭuvaṭaiya vaṭakkiṭṭu vāykkālukku
Eṅka(ḷ)ḷūr śrīvaiykun=ta viṇṇakar Āḻvāṟku nilam kāle kkāṇi nilam nikki nāṅkaḷ Ivarkku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilam Oṉṟaraiye mākāṇi muṉtarikaiyināl tiruvulakaḷan=ta ruḷinapaṭi paṉnīraṭik kolāl nūṟukuḻi koṇṭa torumāvāka van=ta nilamm Iruveliyum Iṉnilattu niṉṟa turavu kiṇaṟukaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttu Iḷaṅkārikuṭaiyāṉ caṅkarate(y)vaṉ civalokanāyakanāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa Anan=ta pālar Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār tirumaṭaiviḷākattup perun=ti ruvāṭṭi yeṉṟu ceyvitta maṭattukku taippūcat tirunāḷil maṉittar nittaniman=ta ttukku Āṇṭārkaḷaiyum civacoki
kaḷaiyum tapasi yaraiyum Amutu[ceyvikkaikku maṭappuṟaṅ koṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceykaikku tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyar koyilil Oṭukki vaitta kācil Iṉnilattukku Iṟaikāvalukku koṇṭa kācu 100 6 10 7 Ikkācu nūṟṟaṟupatteḻināl kāconṟukkup poṉ rājarāja ṉmāṭaiyo ṭokkum poṉ kuṭiñaikallāl poṉ Āṟu mañcāṭiyum kuṉṟiyāka van=ta poṉ nāṟpattu mukkaḻañcey mukkāle Āṟumāvum koṇṭu Iṉnilam cantrā tittavaṟ kke Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Iṉnilattukku peruvari cilvari veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ tiruvācalil po[ n=ta kaṭamai] maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭatum ce
yyakkaṭavarallātārākavum Innilam Ipparicey kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvārāka sa mmatittu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyaār mūlabhṛ (t)tya rākiya Āticaṇṭeśva rateva(r)ṟku Abhaiyaāśri yaccaruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhai yom meḻuttu sabhai yuḷ ḷiruntu paṇittār kevuciyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ civāsutevapaṭṭa Ātu si yar paṇiyālum pāratāya ṉārāyaṇan patmanāpaṉ paṇiyālum kavuṇiya nārāyaṇaṉ śrīkṛṣṇa nār paṇiyālum tirunatta(ta)vuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaraṅkaṉ paṇippaṇiyālum kavuciyaṉ tirunattavuṭaiyāṉ vāsutevanār paṇiyālum kavuciyaṉ Iraiyāṉ caṅkaranārāyaṇanārThe rest of the inscription has not been engraved.
Digital edition of SII 5.702 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
